title: Image2 그라디언트 아트 - Gradient Art Infinite Love Marathon Guitar
summary: Image2 Hub의 포스터 / 그라디언트 아트 카테고리에서 가져온 이미지 생성 스타일입니다. 한국어 텍스트가 필요한 장면은 한국어 라벨과 카피를 사용하도록 조정했습니다.
prompt: Swiss International style, modern minimalist flat vector poster, 9:16 aspect ratio, diagonal sliced layout. Top-left: Traditional Korean title in serif type paired with elegant connected script serif English. Bottom-right: core symbolic graphic for the poster — abstract flat vector illustration, fluorescent color gradients, subtle grain noise, decorative pixel icons, contemporary cultural festival poster, modern design exhibition quality. Theme: Infinite Love Marathon Concerts. 4K. Use Korean-language copy, labels, captions, titles, and UI text wherever text appears; keep all text readable and culturally natural for Korean users.
